features: NOTHING REDUCES FEVER FASTER, OR FOR LONGER - Nurofen for children starts to work in just 15 minutes to reduce fever, and provides up to 8 hours fever relief
PROVIDES LONGER LASTING FEVER RELIEF THAN PARACETAMOL - Up to 8 hour fever relief to help your little ones sleep through the night, contains ibuprofen which has anti-inflammatory properties
GENTLE ON LITTLE TUMMIES - A kiss can help children feel better for a moment or two, until we find something longer-lasting
FREE FROM ARTIFICIAL COLOURS AND FLAVOURS - Nurofen for children is specially formulated for little ones and free from sugar, artificial colours, and gluten for your peace of mind
FOR THE RELIEF OF MILD TO MODERATE PAIN - Suitable for relief of fever, teething, relieving cold and flu symptoms, headache and minor aches or sprains
Syringe for accurate and easy dosing

This product is quantity restricted and a maximum of 2 products containing paracetamol, aspirin or ibuprofen can be bought per week per customer, suitable for babies from 3 months and weighing over 5 kg
Nurofen for children 3 months to 9 years strawberry suspension, contains ibuprofen, for pain and fever relief, for children from 3 months and weighing over 5 kg Always read the label. RKT-M-18823
description: Product Description Nurofen for Children Orange 3 months to 9 years 100 mg/5 ml Oral Suspension is a liquid Ibuprofen suspension that provides pain and fever relief for children. Ingredients Contains Ibuprofen 100mg/5ml Suspension Also contains: Maltitol Liquid and Glycerol Directions DIRECTIONS: For oral use. Shake the bottle well before use. Use the syringe inside to measure the dose accurately (See leaflet for details). POST IMMUNISATION FEVER: One 2.5ml dose followed by one further 2.5ml dose 6 hours later if necessary. No more than two 2.5ml doses in 24 hours. If the fever is not reduced, consult your doctor. Not suitable for children under 3 months of age. FEVER AND PAIN: CHILD'S AGE: 3-6 months (weighing more than 5kg), HOW MUCH: 2.5ml, HOW OFTEN IN 24 HOURS: 3 times. CHILD'S AGE: 6-12 months, HOW MUCH: 2.5ml, HOW OFTEN IN 24 HOURS: 3-4 times. CHILD'S AGE: 1-3 years, HOW MUCH: 5ml, HOW OFTEN IN 24 HOURS: 3 times. CHILD'S AGE: 4-6 years, HOW MUCH: 7.5ml, HOW OFTEN IN 24 HOURS: 3 times. CHILD'S AGE: 7-9 years, HOW MUCH: 10ml, HOW OFTEN IN 24 HOURS: 3 times. Doses should be given approximately every 6 to 8 hours if required, with a minimum of 4 hours between each dose. DO NOT EXCEED THE STATED DOSE. For short term use only. Do not give to babies aged 3 to 6 months for longer than 24 hours. Do not give to children over 6 months for longer than 3 days. If symptoms persist or worsen, consult your doctor. READ THE ENCLOSED LEAFLET CAREFULLY BEFORE USE. DO NOT GIVE THIS PRODUCT IF YOUR BABY OR CHILD: Is under 3 months old or weighs less than 5kg. Has or has ever had a stomach ulcer, perforation or bleeding of the stomach. Is allergic to ibuprofen or any other ingredient of the product, aspirin or other related painkillers. Is taking other NSAID painkillers, or aspirin with a daily dose above 75mg. SPEAK TO YOUR DOCTOR OR PHARMACIST BEFORE GIVING THIS PRODUCT IF YOUR BABY OR CHILD: Has asthma, liver, heart, kidney or bowel problems. ADULTS intending to take this product should take note of the above warnings. Pregnant women should consult a doctor or pharmacist before taking. Safety Warning Do not store above 25°C. KEEP ALL MEDICINES OUT OF THE REACH AND SIGHT OF CHILDREN. Min Age Limit (Advisory): 3 Months Manufacturer Contact Information Wellcroft House Wellcroft Road Slough Sl1 4Aq See more
